# CWE-334 vulnerable — Small Space of Random Values
lang: go
file: CWE-334-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) NamedExec(query string, arg interface{}) error { return nil }

func MintInviteToken(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	token := strconv.Itoa(rand.Intn(4096))
	return db.NamedExec("INSERT INTO invites (token, owner) VALUES (:token, :owner)", map[string]string{
		"token": token,
		"owner": c.Request.URL.Query().Get("owner"),
	})
}
